dialogos.texto_en: During the daytime, it was a lively place, but...\nthe atmosphere has changed a bit, hasn't it?
It's like it's calm now.\nIt's perfect for a leisurely walk.
Yes, I'm glad we came.
(The light show isn't so flashy,\n but the buildings floating in the dusky light\n are almost dreamy.)
Shall we walk slowly?\nWe shouldn't miss out on this scenery.
Yeah.
...What's that sound?
That's a 'sanshin.'\nSomeone is playing it over there.
You know...what a sanshin is, right?
Yes, it's a traditional Okinawan instrument\nsimilar to a shamisen, right?
I've only been in Okinawa for two days, but\nI've heard this sound many times already.
Yeah, I guess we've become more familiar with\nOkinawa than expected.\nThis is just a natural part of Okinawan people's lives.
The cityscape is clearly filled\nwith a European atmosphere, and whenever\nI hear this melody, it reminds me of being in Okinawa.
Although they seem mismatched...\nIt feels perfectly natural...
This atmosphere is something that you can't appreciate\nunless you actually come here. After all, you really can't \nknow until you see and hear it for yourself.
Absolutely.
I'm happy...that I can feel this way\nwith you, Uesu... Futaro.
...I feel the same way.
I could listen to this forever,\nbut shall we go soon?
Oh, the projection mapping is about to start.
According to the guide, this is the venue.
(There are other people who seem to be waiting\n for it to start,\n so it looks like we're in the right place...)
Could it be that they're going to project images\nonto these stairs?
I see, so this is the screen.\nI wonder what we'll be able to see?
...Oh, looks like it's starting.
(Particles of light appear on the stairs\n that go along with the music.\n Then it gradually increases%p-2;――%p;)
(Wow, it's like a sea of blue light.\n This must be a representation\n of the sea in Okinawa.)
Wow...!
(Creatures from the sea of Okinawa\n come out, one after another.)
(Small fish form schools, and giant rays and whales\n follow their paths of light and overtake them%p-2;――%p;)
This is...beyond imagination...
Yes! It's so fantastical!
Whales, sea turtles,\nand various types of fish\nreally seem to be swimming in a sea of light...
Watching this...\nI feel like I'm swimming around in the sea with them.\nIt's such a great feeling.
Yeah...
...Looks like it's over.
I wonder how long the program was.\nIt felt like it was over in an instant.
Yes, I was completely absorbed in it\nuntil the end without saying a word.\nOther people seemed to be feeling the same way.
Only the children seemed to be lively.\nThey were so excited,\nwondering if what they saw was real.
Teehee, the children must find it very magical.\nEven though it looks like they're really there,\nyou can't actually touch them.
...Ah, so, what are we going to do now?\nThe projection mapping that we came for is over...\nshould we go back?
Just a little longer...
Okay, just a little longer wouldn't hurt.
Yes...
Oh?\nWhere did everyone go?
They might have left\nsince the projection mapping is over.
(It's just us... There's no one else...\n This is...!)
...Well, you can't really see the sea well\nat this time of the day.
Y-yeah.
But even now, at this moment,\nthere are surely many creatures swimming in the sea\nlike in the video we just saw.
W-well, I guess so.
In the video, they jumped out of the sea\nand danced in the starry sky, didn't they?
Yeah, that was the most beautiful part.
I wonder if even the creatures living in the sea,\nlook up at the sky%p-2;――
And imagine swimming endlessly\nin the vastness of space.
They just might.
Thinking so is quite exciting, isn't it?
Y-yeah.
(Uh oh, am I thinking too much\n and unable to respond properly?\n Itsuki might think I'm acting weird!)
U-um, Itsuki?\nYou're kinda touching me with your hand...
Ah!\nExcuse me...
They'd be surprised at how big it is,\nif they could fly out into space.\nThe ocean is vast, but space seems infinite.
Heheh, that's true.\nThey might get scared and hurry back to the sea.
Even so, their longing would never stop,\nand bit by bit, they would keep moving forward.
Tomorrow, they'd go to the moon,\nand the next day, they'd go see\nthe far side of the moon...like that.
U-um, Itsuki?\nYou're kinda touching me with your hand...
Ah!\nExcuse me...
You wanna join them, Itsuki?
Well, let me see.\nI do have a dream of taking a walk under the starry sky.
Just for the record, becoming an astronaut\nrequires a considerable amount of effort.
Oh my goodness. Don't suddenly say things\nthat crush my dreams like that.
Ah, no, if you are serious about aiming for space,\nI just meant you need to be more prepared.\nI mean, I was going to help you with that.
Ah...
Oh, sorry for saying something so presumptuous.\nIt was your way of showing kindness, after all.
Well, I guess I went too far.\nHahaha...
I appreciate that no matter what my dreams are,\nyou'll take them seriously and I can lean on you for support%p-2;――
You are my absolute, when I think about it.
U-um, Itsuki?\nYou're kinda touching me with your hand...
Ah!\nExcuse me...
No... It's fine.
(No, that's not it!\n If it were to end awkwardly here,\n I won't be able to change from who I was!)
(This is the time to show my determination\n and take a step forward!)
{UNTRANSLATED}――五月。
Huh?\nU-Uesugi-kun...?
(Just like Itsuki tried to be a girlfriend for me,\n I will be honest with my feelings for her...)
I want to walk by your side forever.\nLet's leave Earth and explore the sea of stars together.
Y-yes.
(I will express my feelings properly.\n With a kiss, like a lover%p-2;――%p;)
Itsuki...
{UNTRANSLATED}――え？
(A strike to my cheek...?\n W-what happened?)
(Oh, that's what happened.\n I tried to kiss Itsuki,\n and then...she slapped me...)
Why... Why would you....
